questions: Why don’t Google Ads and Analytics numbers match?
How should we reconcile Ads vs. Analytics reporting?
qa.answer: Attribution models, lookback windows, counting methods (clicks vs. sessions/users), consent and cookie blocking, time zones, and modeled conversions create differences. Use triangulation and align definitions where possible.
implication: Document attribution windows and time zones; align where feasible.
Rely on experiments/MMM for budget moves; treat last‑click with caution.
Implement server‑side tagging and enhanced conversions to improve match.
